definitions.subtitle: ={{ $parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"] }}
definitions.description: Interact with Google Gemini AI models

options.name: Set Automatically
options.description: Automatically set based on resource and operation

options.name: Set Manually
options.description: Manually set the description

properties.name: toolDescription
properties.default: Interact with Google Gemini AI models
properties.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often

options.name: Analyze Audio
options.description: Take in audio and answer questions about it

options.name: Transcribe a Recording
options.description: Transcribes audio into the text

properties.name: audioUrls
properties.description: URL(s) of the audio(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the audio(s), seperate multiple field names with commas

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to simplify the response or not

options.description: Fewer tokens will result in shorter, less detailed audio description
options.name: maxOutputTokens

properties.name: audioUrls
properties.description: URL(s) of the audio(s) to transcribe, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the audio(s), seperate multiple field names with commas

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to simplify the response or not

options.name: startTime
options.description: The start time of the audio in MM:SS or HH:MM:SS format

options.name: endTime
options.description: The end time of the audio in MM:SS or HH:MM:SS format

options.name: Analyze Document
options.description: Take in documents and answer questions about them

properties.name: documentUrls
properties.description: URL(s) of the document(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the document(s), seperate multiple field names with commas

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to simplify the response or not

options.description: Fewer tokens will result in shorter, less detailed document description
options.name: maxOutputTokens
Upload Media File
options.description: Upload a file to the Google Gemini API for later use

properties.name: fileUrl
properties.description: URL of the file to upload

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary property which contains the file

options.name: Create File Search Store
options.description: Create a new File Search store for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)

options.name: Delete File Search Store
options.description: Delete a File Search store

options.name: List File Search Stores
options.description: List all File Search stores owned by the user

options.name: Upload to File Search Store
options.action: Upload a file to a File Search store
options.description: Upload a file to a File Search store for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)

properties.name: displayName
properties.description: A human-readable name for the File Search store

properties.name: fileSearchStoreName
properties.description: The full name of the File Search store to delete (format: fileSearchStores/...)

properties.name: force
properties.description: Whether to delete related Documents and objects. If false, deletion will fail if the store contains any Documents.

properties.name: pageSize
properties.description: Maximum number of File Search stores to return per page (max 20)

properties.name: pageToken
properties.description: Token from a previous page to retrieve the next page of results

properties.name: fileSearchStoreName
properties.description: The full name of the File Search store to upload to (format: fileSearchStores/...)

properties.name: displayName
properties.description: A human-readable name for the file (will be visible in citations)

properties.name: fileUrl
properties.description: URL of the file to upload

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary property which contains the file

options.name: Analyze Image
options.description: Take in images and answer questions about them

options.name: Generate an Image
options.description: Creates an image from a text prompt

options.name: Edit Image
options.description: Upload one or more images and apply edits based on a prompt

properties.name: imageUrls
properties.description: URL(s) of the image(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the image(s), separate multiple field names with commas

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to simplify the response or not

options.description: Fewer tokens will result in shorter, less detailed image description
options.name: maxOutputTokens

properties.name: prompt
properties.placeholder: e.g. combine the first image with the second image
properties.description: Instruction describing how to edit the image

properties.name: images
properties.description: Add one or more binary fields to include images with your prompt

values.name: binaryPropertyName
values.description: The name of the binary field containing the image data

options.name: binaryPropertyOutput
options.hint: The name of the output field to put the binary file data in

properties.name: prompt
properties.placeholder: e.g. A cute cat eating a dinosaur
properties.description: A text description of the desired image(s)

options.name: sampleCount
options.description: Number of images to generate

options.name: binaryPropertyOutput
options.hint: The name of the output field to put the binary file data in

options.name: Message a Model
options.description: Create a completion with Google Gemini model

values.name: content
values.description: The content of the message to be send
values.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

values.name: role
values.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

options.name: User
options.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

options.name: Model
options.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

properties.name: jsonOutput
properties.description: Whether to attempt to return the response in JSON format

options.name: googleSearch
options.description: Whether to allow the model to search the web using Google Search to get real-time information

options.name: latitude
options.description: The latitude coordinate for location-based queries

options.name: longitude
options.description: The longitude coordinate for location-based queries

options.name: urlContext
options.description: Whether to allow the model to read and analyze content from specific URLs

options.name: fileSearchStoreNames
options.description: The file search store names to use for the file search. File search stores are managed via Google AI Studio.

options.name: metadataFilter
options.description: Use metadata filter to search within a subset of documents. Example: author="Robert Graves".

options.name: codeExecution
options.description: Whether to allow the model to execute code it generates to produce a response. Supported only by certain models.

options.name: includeMergedResponse
options.description: Whether to include a single output string merging all text parts of the response

options.name: systemMessage
options.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant

options.name: codeExecution
options.description: Whether to allow the model to execute code it generates to produce a response. Supported only by certain models.

options.name: frequencyPenalty
options.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim

options.name: maxOutputTokens
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

options.name: candidateCount
options.description: How many completions to generate for each prompt

options.name: presencePenalty
options.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics

options.name: temperature
options.description: Controls the randomness of the output. Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive

options.name: topP
options.description: The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling

options.name: topK
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling

options.name: thinkingBudget
options.description: Controls reasoning tokens for thinking models. Set to 0 to disable automatic thinking. Set to -1 for dynamic thinking (default).

options.name: maxToolsIterations
options.description: The maximum number of tool iteration cycles the LLM will run before stopping. A single iteration can contain multiple tool calls. Set to 0 for no limit

options.name: Analyze Video
options.description: Take in videos and answer questions about them

options.name: Generate a Video
options.description: Creates a video from a text prompt

options.name: Download Video
options.description: Download a generated video from the Google Gemini API using a URL

properties.name: videoUrls
properties.description: URL(s) of the video(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the video(s), seperate multiple field names with commas

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to simplify the response or not

options.description: Fewer tokens will result in shorter, less detailed video description
options.name: maxOutputTokens

properties.name: url
properties.description: The URL from Google Gemini API to download the video from

options.name: binaryPropertyOutput
options.hint: The name of the output field to put the binary file data in

properties.name: prompt
properties.placeholder: e.g. Panning wide shot of a calico kitten sleeping in the sunshine
properties.description: A text description of the desired video

properties.name: returnAs
properties.description: Whether to return the video as a binary file or a URL that can be used to download the video later

options.name: sampleCount
options.description: How many videos to generate

options.name: durationSeconds
options.description: Length of the generated video in seconds. Supported only by certain models.

options.name: Widescreen (16:9)
options.description: Most common aspect ratio for televisions and monitors

options.name: Portrait (9:16)
options.description: Popular for short-form videos like YouTube Shorts

options.name: Don't Allow
options.description: Prevent generation of people in the video

options.name: Allow Adult
options.description: Allow generation of adult people in the video

options.name: Allow All
options.description: Allow generation of all people in the video

options.name: binaryPropertyOutput
options.hint: The name of the output field to put the binary file data in

definitions.name: @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.googleGeminiTool
